title: Feedback - send a Bug feedback with names/email
scenario: Bug feedback submitted via App Settings > Feedback does not include user's name and email when sent
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or your profile avatar to access App Settings.
Enter a description of the bug in the text field.
Enter the user's name and email address in the respective fields.
expected: Feedback is sent with the user's name and email attached.
